judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python, the agent used an overly restrictive regex on the Patents_info field (e.g., r'\bfrom DE\b|\bDE application\b|\bin DE, the application\b|\bthe DE patent application\b|\bfrom Germany\b') to detect German records from the H2 2019 grants query, which yielded zero matches and led to an empty result instead of the expected CPC groups.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent computed EMA by grant year instead of filing year and did not join to CPC definitions for titles, while filtering Germany via a simple '\bDE\b' regex on Patents_info that yielded no rows, leading it to prematurely conclude "no results" rather than producing the requested CPC-level-4 rankings.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In call_KPnK4obnp65iJn5gjD523s8q the agent computed EMA using the grant_date year (not filing_date as requested) and derived “level‑4” CPC groups by truncating codes before “/” (e.g., A61M5), then in call_XzMquGuQP0yLFBHTWScuDdN7 tried to join these to level-4 symbols (e.g., A61) in CPCDefinition_database, resulting in NaN titles and a 2019-only best year list that does not match the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python step, the agent filtered for Germany using a brittle regex on Patents_info and, more critically, computed counts by grant year (sub['year'] = sub['grant_dt'].apply(lambda x: x.year) and never used filing_date), then returned an empty result instead of calculating the EMA of patent filings by filing year for German patents granted in H2 2019.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step (using results from query_db on publicationinfo and cpc_definition), the agent filtered Germany via a brittle substring in Patents_info and then used grant_date (restricted to H2 2019) as the year basis—yielding only 2019 and no multi-year series—rather than computing EMA over filing_date by year for the H2‑2019 granted set, so it returned “not possible” instead of the correct CPC groups and best years.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
